description:
A powerful virtual tour software that converts your panoramic or 360° photos and videos into interactive experiences.

Pano2VR is a powerful virtual tour software that converts your panoramic or 360° photos and videos into interactive experiences.
Whether you’re working on a single gigapixel panorama or a virtual tour with thousands of scenes, Pano2VR can help you create an immersive experience for any modern browser. Finished projects can be seamlessly integrated with existing websites and viewed on desktops and mobile or VR devices.
This is a bug fix release for Pano2VR 8.
- Fixes for alternative video panorama files
- Fix for several crash bugs
- Fix for single quote in translated VR-Skins
- Fix for empty node in old “save as default” projects
- Fix for creating keyframes at time 0
- Fix malformed font links from pasted Google Fonts embed snippets
- Fixes for default view with projections
- Fix for hotspot target viewer, if "unload images" was enabled.
- Avoid overwriting “_master” on a single-node project
